title: Fat Frogs
description: Turns frogs very fat, still wondering how they can jump so high?
body:
![fat frogs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de18725f1d3bdf8b2d04c3f3dd502a40f128c9df.png)**This resource pack turns frogs very fat, they are so chunky after eating a ton of slimes. They are now one of the chunkiest pets in existence. This pack does not touch any other mobs. Make your pet frog fat today!**

### Dependencies:
### [EMF] Entity Model Features
### [ETF] Entity Texture Features
